mapper.select: SELECT h.*, u.nickname FROM health_record h LEFT JOIN user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_record(user_id, height, weight, bmi, systolic, diastolic, blood_sugar, heart_rate, record_date, remark) VALUES(#{userId}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{bmi}, #{systolic}, #{diastolic}, #{bloodSugar}, #{heartRate}, #{recordDate}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%m-%d') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM health_record WHERE record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY record_date
